feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to add fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS view in a BADI and show it in adobe form
entry.content: In SAP Public cloud, I want to fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS VIEW inside a BADI and then show those values in a table inside adobe form. The problem is, the BADI executes only once, and I am able to fetch only one record at a time and show it in the adobe form, what I need is to fetch multiple records at once and display them all in the adobe form template

entry.title: How to add fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS view in a BADI and show it in adobe form
entry.content: In SAP Public cloud, I want to fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS VIEW inside a BADI and then show those values in a table inside adobe form. The problem is, the BADI executes only once, and I am able to fetch only one record at a time and show it in the adobe form, what I need is to fetch multiple records at once and display them all in the adobe form template

entry.title: How to add fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS view in a BADI and show it in adobe form
entry.content: In SAP Public cloud, I want to fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS VIEW inside a BADI and then show those values in a table inside adobe form. The problem is, the BADI executes only once, and I am able to fetch only one record at a time and show it in the adobe form, what I need is to fetch multiple records at once and display them all in the adobe form template

entry.title: KSW5- Public CLoud WBS to WBS
entry.content: In the GUI system, we could select the receiving WBS and sending WBS with KSW1. Then we could perform the deployment with KSW5. How can I do this in the Public Cloud system?

entry.title: Public Cloud - CDS - SAC - Authorization Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to extract data both in Live and Data Acquisition mode for my SAC Report. It is a public Cloud edition and the extraction I need have specific needs so I chose eclipse to build the CDS (CDS Name is ZTEST). Data preview is good. So

STEPS I FOLLOWED:

1. Create a CDS View ZTEST ( it calls I_GLAccountLineItem) it has certain authorization objects (Not sure whther these authorization automatically extends to the calling CDS ZTEST) 

2.  I created a Service Definition to my newly created CDS View (ZTEST_SERVICE).

3. I created two different Service Bindings. One with InA - UI and OData V2 - Web API (2 Bindings)

4. OData V2 - Web API created a Service URL (/sap/opu/odata/ZTEST) and an Entity Set and Association as ZTEST.

- OData Service URL with full path extracts data in the browser (I think this as a minimum guarentee to bring data to SAC) 

- When I try to create a Data Acquisition model it showed the query, let me Build Odata Service Query and when I try to create the query , I got an error 

The user does not have permission to access the requested resource.
Correlation ID: 30444370-1995-4409-9954-495703651595
(May be this is very specific to the user not having access to the underlying CDS Access? Not sure)
5. InA - UI created a familiar External Service name with 2CZTEST

   Live Data Model attepmpt - External Service name 2CZTEST shows up and upon selection it flashes the key figure value (model is still building) and throws an error:   

Server Error: Error [Server]: You do not have start authorization for R3TR INA1 ZTEST_DDL2_INA_BINDING, return code 4.
Correlation ID: 40361062-2532-4327-9467-617666356051
 
Appreciate all the help I can get.
 
Thank you,
Arthur.

entry.title: S4 Public Cloud: CDS view for batch characteristics values
entry.content:
Hello all!

We are in public cloud and have a simple requirement - to create a CDS view with the following outputs:

- Batch Number

- Characteristic

- Characteristic Values

I have been exploring all available data views, the closest I have found is: I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate

With this view the output am getting is:

And this does not give me what we need. 

Could you please recommend other views which I can turn into a CDS view just to get the batch characteristics?

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Will 'Refund Control' = 'Create Credit Memo Request' trigger the 'Credit Memo Request' Workflow?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are about to implement the 'Credit Memo Request' workflow, and are wondering:

  • Does a Customer Return trigger this approval process when Item Refund Control = 'Create Credit Memo Request'?

We are hoping this will be the case because many Credit Memos for Returns are for higher values than they should be (appropriate deductions are not being made), and an Approver is expected to check that a Credit Memo is correct before posting occurs.

We don't want to implement an Approval Process on Customer Returns as not all Returns result in a Credit Memo. We plan to direct Users to only select 'Create Credit Memo Request' so long as the approval process is triggered.

As always, any insight is much appreciated. Thank you.

Kind regards,

Tu

entry.title: Standard export to spreadsheet functionality in eclipse for sap S/4HANA Cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to know how to enhance standard export function. *sap public cloud in eclipse

ex: If the product name: 111  ,then output csv : 0000000111  (char(10))

For purposing to upload and download spreadsheet.

Thanks

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: Attachment size control
entry.content: Customer wants to limit user to only upload file size eg. max. 5mb and does not want user to upload large image file. Can we restrict the attachment file upload size in S4Hana Cloud Public Edition? If yes, can it be controlled by file formats? Any limitation on the attachment upload formats?

entry.title: Document change records
entry.content: Is there any automation archive function for the change logs in system? For example, there are lots of Output record created when sales order is changed. Our customer is concerning will the system out of storage space due to these log files.

entry.title: Change log Control
entry.content:
Why S4hana cloud public edition has IMG setting "Fields relevant to printouts of changes" on change log control for purchase order, but no configure on sales order? 

 

Any standard setting can control the fields for change logs in sales documents?

entry.title: Customize printout format
entry.content:
Can we customize the SO/PO printout report to include change logs down to value level? Our customer does not want general change message, they wants to show the new and old values as well. 

 

We checked on the Adobe LiveCycle Designer, but seems can not find the change values relevant field can be used? Any standard approach/ workarounds?

entry.title: Attachement API
entry.content: Can document attachment API upload image in product master data in S4hana cloud public edition? Any examples or relevant information can provide for reference? We are not able to find any guiding on this.

entry.title: Adding a tab in manage cost center app using UI Adaptation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have one requirement to add a tab in "Manage cost center"  app, and under that tab to add few fields.

While am trying to add a tab using UI Adaptation, am getting below error.

If anyone has faced similar challenges, let me know. And Please help if you have implemented these changes in your project.

Thanks.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition

entry.title: How is the "Missing Hours" is being calculated in "Manage My Timehseet" application ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We would really like to know in "Manage My Timesheet" app how is the Missing Hours which displays in the overview of the App Tile is calculated ? 

Also, is there any way we also can check where is this missing hours flowing from ?

We have done internal analysis on the reporting perspective and see that planned hours and actual hours are matching; but we are not really sure where is this missing hours coming from ?

Any lead on this topic is much appreciated.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: What is the process of Back ground job in HANA Public cloud and How we can schedule
entry.content:
Hello All

Hope your are doing well !

We have received a requirement from the client. They need to schedule background jobs on the cloud server, similar to how they do in the on-premises system. Could you please let us know if we can schedule jobs for both standard and custom programs, and ensure the job runs every day?

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: Currency conversion is not functioning incorrect setup issue with public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am writing to address an important issue we are facing regarding the currency conversions within our newly created company code in Hong Kong. As per the default settings in the SAP public cloud, the company code currency is set to HKD, while our intended currency is USD.

Following our previous discussions with SAP, we have attempted to maintain the functional currency as USD as guided by the relevant Snote. However, we are currently encountering discrepancies when transactions are posted in EUR; these amounts are being converted first to HKD and then to USD, which is resulting in differences that we cannot account for.

To resolve this, we need to ensure that the conversion is consistently made from EUR directly to USD without the intermediate HKD conversion. I would appreciate your insights or any further steps we can take to rectify this situation.

entry.title: Custom field logic
entry.content:
Is modifying custom field logic in purchase item able to retrieve sales order item's information?

Customer requires to copy the sales item's long text from SO to PR custom shipment remark field when it is created from MRP. Is this possible?

entry.title: Issue with Data Types: Batch Load Data into a Custom Business Object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I referred below Blog to upload data into Custom Business Object using EXCEL.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/batch-load-data-into-a-custom-business-object-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13359205

Everything was working great except if custom business objects has any field with data types Quantity/Amount is not working while uploading data through excel.

@MartyMcCormick

API NW ABAP Gateway (OData)

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP S4HC Professional Services - 2nd Approval Level for Timesheet Entries?
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a business requirement to have a 2nd approval level for timesheet entries, for both internal and customer project.

The first approval level works for both project types, but we are unable to find a way to add a second approval level.

The requirement is:

Customer Projects: 

1st approval level - Project Manager (OK)

2nd approval level - Finance team (NOK)

Internal Projects: 

1st approval level - Responsible Cost Center, using BADI HCM_CATS_V1_APPROVER_DETRMN (OK)

2nd approval level - Finance team (NOK)

 

The note 3495575 - Timesheet Approval Workflow helped us for the first approval level but not for more than one.

Please let us know if a solution is available.

Thank you in advance!
